name: Ranch Style Brunch Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a large frying pan until it is crisp. Drain the bacon, reserving about 3 tablespoons of drippings.
2. In the same pan using the reserved drippings, sauté the hash brown potatoes until they are browned, which should take about 10 minutes.
3. Divide the cooked potatoes among four individual greased, 1-cup shallow baking dishes.
4. Sprinkle the shredded cheese over the potatoes in each dish, followed by the chopped bacon.
5. Beat together the eggs, milk, and sliced green onions.
6. Pour the egg mixture evenly into the prepared dishes.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 20 to 25 minutes, or until set.
8. Garnish as desired before serving.
